历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 1210 → 1182 → 1089 → 1341 → 1884, showing an overall trend of initial stability followed by a decline. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 1089 and 1210 from 2021 to 2023, shifted to 1341 in 2024, and significantly dropped to 1884 in 2025, a decline of 543 places from 2024 and a cumulative decline of 795 places over the past two years, indicating intensified competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1884. Wuhan University's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province: 54 students in 2021, 45 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 45 in 2025. For 2026, the physics category plan is 42 students (plus 9 in medical category, totaling 51), a reduction of 3 students from 2025, a decrease of about 6.67%, indicating a slight tightening of enrollment slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranked 8th nationally in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 10 nationwide), with a stable and slightly rising ranking in recent years, firmly placing it among the top tier of universities in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Wuhan University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving 99 incidents related to school management, campus safety, teacher ethics, etc. (64 negative), with significant public opinion pressure that may inhibit some students' willingness to apply. It ranks 19th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and sustained attention. In historical admission anomaly records, a somewhat negative signal appeared in 2023, but no severe gaps occurred. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Wuhan University's A+ disciplines include Law, Marxist Theory, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, and Geophysics. A disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature, Biology, Business Administration, and Water Conservancy Engineering. A- disciplines include Journalism and Communication, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Stomatology, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering. Disciplines like Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology (A+), Water Conservancy Engineering (A), and Computer Science and Technology (A-) are highly attractive to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science is highly recommended, electronics/information and communication are highly recommended, electrical engineering and automation is highly recommended, clinical medicine is recommended, and stomatology is recommended. Overall, popular science and engineering majors have high heat. The total number of registered students for the 2026 Jilin Province college entrance examination is 110,868. Estimating about 72% as physics category students, this is approximately 79,825, roughly the same as the 80,421 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in historical rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 by about 6.67% (slightly intensifying competition), the university's stable top 8 national ranking (continuing to attract high-scoring students), the somewhat negative reputation (possibly suppressing some application willingness), the basically unchanged total number of students, and the overall high heat of popular science and engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 1884, the downward trend continues and partially offsets the enrollment reduction effect. The ranking is expected to continue a slight decline (slightly larger number). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1839, with a range of 1618 to 2060.

- Computer Science (School of Computer Science) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)

- Robotics Engineering (including Robotics Engineering, Automation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Water Conservancy) (Water Conservancy and Hydropower Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering, etc.)
- Spatiotemporal Information Engineering (including Spatiotemporal Information Engineering, Navigation Engineering, Surveying Engineering)
- Chemistry (Chemistry (including Chemistry-Biology direction), Applied Chemistry)
- Smart City and Spatial Planning (including Geographic Information Science, Geography)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1618 to 2060, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1618), focus on top majors like the 8-year program, Hongyi College, and Computer Science. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 2060), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety. Popular engineering majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high application heat, so sufficient ranking margin should be reserved. The A+ discipline of Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is a signature strength of Wuhan University with high cost-effectiveness and deserves special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were 182 → 199 → 340 → 312 → 249, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing. In 2023, the ranking significantly dropped to 340, rebounded to 312 in 2024, and further rebounded to 249 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 91 places in the last two years, indicating a recovery in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 249. Wuhan University's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jilin Province: 14 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 15, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a reduction of about 11.8%, tightening enrollment quotas will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 8th nationally in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 10 nationwide), with a stable upward trend in recent years (9th from 2021-2024 → 8th in 2025-2026), solidifying its position among the top universities in the country. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Wuhan University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving 99 incidents related to school management, campus safety, teacher ethics, etc. (64 negative), with significant public opinion pressure, which may inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 19th overall (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining attention. Historical admission anomaly records show a somewhat negative signal in 2023, but no severe gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Wuhan University's A+ disciplines include Law, Marxist Theory, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, and Geophysics; A disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature, Biology, Business Administration, and Water Conservancy Engineering; A- disciplines include Journalism and Communication, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Stomatology, Applied Economics, Theoretical Economics, and Computer Science and Technology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity but shows a trend of divergence and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication majors are clearly discouraged; Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese majors are recommended. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province college entrance examination is 110,868, with an estimated 31,043 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 28%, basically unchanged from 31,071 in 2025, so the competition base has not significantly expanded. A+ disciplines like Law and Marxist Theory strongly attract liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 11.8% intensifying competition, the university's stable position in the national Top 8 continuing to attract candidates, the somewhat negative reputation possibly suppressing some application willingness, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates, the reduction effect and negative reputation offset each other. Based on the 2025 baseline of 249, the ranking is expected to advance slightly (smaller number). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 241, with a range of 191–291.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical programs in Jilin Province over the past five years are: 2021: 795 (planned 4 students), 2022: 1869 (planned 6 students), 2023: 6640 (planned 10 students), 2024: 9206 (planned 17 students), 2025: 8977 (planned 12 students). Overall, there is a continuous downward trend (ranking numbers increase, admission threshold decreases), but 2025 shows a slight rebound of 229 places compared to 2024, indicating a bottoming-out and recovery. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is reduced to 9 students (a decrease of 3 from 2025, a 25% reduction), and supply-demand elasticity calculations show that the ranking will significantly move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and has been selected as a Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines rely on the university's strong comprehensive platform, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors enjoying high reputations, and it has a sustained appeal to Jilin Province candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising, especially long-term programs like clinical medicine and stomatology, which are highly competitive. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, a central city in Central China, with obvious regional advantages. The medical enrollment scale in Jilin Province is small (only 9 students in 2026), and the scarcity of places further increases competition. It is expected that the admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and recent ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical programs in Jilin Province in 2026 will be approximately 7730, moving forward by about 1247 places compared to 2025 (8977). The fluctuation range is expected to be between 7498 and 7962. Candidates are advised to plan their applications reasonably within this range.
